006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest;
018
019import java.util.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.http.response.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.petstore.dto.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.petstore.service.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.*;
027
028/**
029 * Petstore CRUD REST resource.
030 *
031 * <p>
032 * Deployment-agnostic.  Mounted by both {@code juneau-petstore-jetty} and {@code juneau-petstore-springboot} via
033 * the {@code @Rest(children=...)} of their root router.
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * Endpoints:
037 * <ul>
038 *    <li>{@code GET    /pets}                — list pets
039 *    <li>{@code GET    /pets/{id}}           — get pet
040 *    <li>{@code POST   /pets}                — create pet
041 *    <li>{@code PUT    /pets/{id}}           — update pet
042 *    <li>{@code DELETE /pets/{id}}           — delete pet
043 *    <li>{@code GET    /orders}              — list orders
044 *    <li>{@code GET    /orders/{id}}         — get order
045 *    <li>{@code POST   /orders}              — create order
046 *    <li>{@code PUT    /orders/{id}}         — update order
047 *    <li>{@code DELETE /orders/{id}}         — delete order
048 *    <li>{@code GET    /users}               — list users
049 *    <li>{@code GET    /users/{username}}    — get user
050 *    <li>{@code POST   /users}               — create user
051 *    <li>{@code PUT    /users/{username}}    — update user
052 *    <li>{@code DELETE /users/{username}}    — delete user
053 * </ul>
054 *
055 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
056 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauPetstore">juneau-petstore</a>
057 * </ul>
058 */
059@Rest(
060   path="/petstore",
061   title="Petstore",
062   description="Apache Juneau petstore sample resource."
063)
064@SuppressWarnings({
065   "java:S110" // Inheritance depth acceptable for example/demo code
066})
067public class PetStoreResource extends BasicRestServlet {
068
069   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
070
071   /** Backing store.  Singleton servlet → singleton store, shared across requests. */
072   private final transient PetStore store = new PetStore();
073
074   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
075   // Pets
076   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
077
078   /**
079    * Lists all pets.
080    *
081    * @return All pets.
082    */
083   @RestGet("/pets")
084   public Collection<Pet> getPets() {
085      return store.getPets();
086   }
087
088   /**
089    * Retrieves a pet by ID.
090    *
091    * @param id The pet ID.
092    * @return The pet.
093    * @throws NotFound If no pet with the given ID exists.
094    */
095   @RestGet("/pets/{id}")
096   public Pet getPet(@Path("id") long id) {
097      var pet = store.getPet(id);
098      if (pet == null)
099         throw new NotFound("Pet not found: id={0}", id);
100      return pet;
101   }
102
103   /**
104    * Creates a new pet.
105    *
106    * @param pet The pet to create.
107    * @return The created pet (with assigned ID).
108    */
109   @RestPost("/pets")
110   public Pet createPet(@Content Pet pet) {
111      return store.createPet(pet);
112   }
113
114   /**
115    * Updates an existing pet.
116    *
117    * @param id The pet ID.
118    * @param pet The replacement pet body.
119    * @return The updated pet.
120    * @throws NotFound If no pet with the given ID exists.
121    */
122   @RestPut("/pets/{id}")
123   public Pet updatePet(@Path("id") long id, @Content Pet pet) {
124      pet.setId(id);
125      try {
126         return store.updatePet(pet);
127      } catch (PetstoreNotFoundException e) {
128         throw new NotFound(e.getMessage());
129      }
130   }
131
132   /**
133    * Deletes a pet by ID.
134    *
135    * @param id The pet ID.
136    * @throws NotFound If no pet with the given ID exists.
137    */
138   @RestDelete("/pets/{id}")
139   public void deletePet(@Path("id") long id) {
140      try {
141         store.deletePet(id);
142      } catch (PetstoreNotFoundException e) {
143         throw new NotFound(e.getMessage());
144      }
145   }
146
147   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
148   // Orders
149   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
150
151   /**
152    * Lists all orders.
153    *
154    * @return All orders.
155    */
156   @RestGet("/orders")
157   public Collection<Order> getOrders() {
158      return store.getOrders();
159   }
160
161   /**
162    * Retrieves an order by ID.
163    *
164    * @param id The order ID.
165    * @return The order.
166    * @throws NotFound If no order with the given ID exists.
167    */
168   @RestGet("/orders/{id}")
169   public Order getOrder(@Path("id") long id) {
170      var order = store.getOrder(id);
171      if (order == null)
172         throw new NotFound("Order not found: id={0}", id);
173      return order;
174   }
175
176   /**
177    * Creates a new order.
178    *
179    * @param order The order to create.
180    * @return The created order (with assigned ID).
181    */
182   @RestPost("/orders")
183   public Order createOrder(@Content Order order) {
184      return store.createOrder(order);
185   }
186
187   /**
188    * Updates an existing order.
189    *
190    * @param id The order ID.
191    * @param order The replacement order body.
192    * @return The updated order.
193    * @throws NotFound If no order with the given ID exists.
194    */
195   @RestPut("/orders/{id}")
196   public Order updateOrder(@Path("id") long id, @Content Order order) {
197      order.setId(id);
198      try {
199         return store.updateOrder(order);
200      } catch (PetstoreNotFoundException e) {
201         throw new NotFound(e.getMessage());
202      }
203   }
204
205   /**
206    * Deletes an order by ID.
207    *
208    * @param id The order ID.
209    * @throws NotFound If no order with the given ID exists.
210    */
211   @RestDelete("/orders/{id}")
212   public void deleteOrder(@Path("id") long id) {
213      try {
214         store.deleteOrder(id);
215      } catch (PetstoreNotFoundException e) {
216         throw new NotFound(e.getMessage());
217      }
218   }
219
220   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
221   // Users
222   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
223
224   /**
225    * Lists all users.
226    *
227    * @return All users.
228    */
229   @RestGet("/users")
230   public Collection<User> getUsers() {
231      return store.getUsers();
232   }
233
234   /**
235    * Retrieves a user by username.
236    *
237    * @param username The username.
238    * @return The user.
239    * @throws NotFound If no user with the given username exists.
240    */
241   @RestGet("/users/{username}")
242   public User getUser(@Path("username") String username) {
243      var user = store.getUser(username);
244      if (user == null)
245         throw new NotFound("User not found: username={0}", username);
246      return user;
247   }
248
249   /**
250    * Creates a new user.
251    *
252    * @param user The user to create.  Must carry a non-null username not already in use.
253    * @return The created user.
254    */
255   @RestPost("/users")
256   public User createUser(@Content User user) {
257      return store.createUser(user);
258   }
259
260   /**
261    * Updates an existing user.
262    *
263    * @param username The username.
264    * @param user The replacement user body.
265    * @return The updated user.
266    * @throws NotFound If no user with the given username exists.
267    */
268   @RestPut("/users/{username}")
269   public User updateUser(@Path("username") String username, @Content User user) {
270      user.setUsername(username);
271      try {
272         return store.updateUser(user);
273      } catch (PetstoreNotFoundException e) {
274         throw new NotFound(e.getMessage());
275      }
276   }
277
278   /**
279    * Deletes a user by username.
280    *
281    * @param username The username.
282    * @throws NotFound If no user with the given username exists.
283    */
284   @RestDelete("/users/{username}")
285   public void deleteUser(@Path("username") String username) {
286      try {
287         store.deleteUser(username);
288      } catch (PetstoreNotFoundException e) {
289         throw new NotFound(e.getMessage());
290      }
291   }
292}
